title: Bindable Mana Pool
description: A tiny addon of Botania, which makes generator flowers able to output to mana pools directly.
body:
A tiny mixin addon of [Botania](https://github.com/VazkiiMods/Botania), which makes generator flowers able to output to mana pools directly.
![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd9d9cc6c12f7ae2bffb55f6d7aa66a91fbe08d0.png)

# Feature
- directly link mana generator flowers to the pool, without going through a spreader first
  - which reduces mana loss and client particle rendering pressure,
  - and might be overpowered for flowers with mechanics about their mana buffers
